detail: tests/ttnn/unit_tests/operations/eltwise/test_atanh.py with exhaustive bfloat16 bitpatterns, bfloat16+fp32 parametrization
bfloat16 ULP delta 4784128 at small input ~0.001 due to catastrophic cancellation in ln(1+x)-ln(1-x)
Split allclose (full domain) from ULP (|atanh|>0.1); ULP dropped to 4.0 but still > threshold 2
bfloat16 passed, fp32 allclose ATOL=0.00153 > 1e-4 threshold (polynomial insufficient for fp32 precision)
ULP threshold 4, |atanh|>0.25 for bfloat16; fp32 atol=2e-3, skip fp32 ULP; polynomial ~10-bit effective precision
2 passed in 1.62s: bfloat16 (allclose+ULP) and fp32 (allclose only)
